articles.title: Stefon Diggs has trial date set in strangulation, assault case
articles.description:
Diggs will face a judge and jury in May after he was charged with strangulation and assault and battery last December.

The post Stefon Diggs has trial date set in strangulation, assault case appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Stefon Diggs faces trial for strangulation and assault charges in May 2024.
Charges stem from an incident that occurred in December 2023.
The outcome may affect Diggs' career and the Boston sports community.

articles.title: ‘What we had talked about, take that to the grave’: Report reveals details about State Police sergeant who allegedly drove drunk, caused fatal crash
articles.description:
Though a newly released report absolves the Middlesex DA’s office of any wrongdoing, it raises a plethora of further questions.

The post ‘What we had talked about, take that to the grave’: Report reveals details about State Police sergeant who allegedly drove drunk, caused fatal crash appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: State Police sergeant allegedly drove drunk, causing a fatal crash in Boston.
Middlesex DA's office cleared of wrongdoing, raising further questions about accountability.
Local residents demand transparency and justice following the tragic incident.

articles.title: Dorchester woman sentenced for fatal stabbing stemming from online feud
articles.description:
The victim, a young South Boston mother, was described as a “deeply loved human being.”

The post Dorchester woman sentenced for fatal stabbing stemming from online feud appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Dorchester woman sentenced to 10 years for stabbing a South Boston mother.
The victim was a young mother, deeply loved by her community.
The case highlights rising violence linked to online disputes in Boston.

articles.title: NBA superstar’s message to Connecticut Sun fans: ‘They’ll be alright, they’ve got UConn’

summary: Connecticut lost its WNBA team, impacting local sports culture and community support.

articles.title: Alex Cora declines to elaborate after scratching Carlos Narvaez hours before Red Sox game

articles.title: Artemis II astronauts bound for moon after rocketing away on NASA’s first lunar voyage in decades
articles.description:
Four astronauts embarked on a high-stakes flight around the moon, humanity’s first lunar voyage in more than half a century.

The post Artemis II astronauts bound for moon after rocketing away on NASA’s first lunar voyage in decades appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Four astronauts launched on Artemis II for a lunar mission, the first in over 50 years.
NASA's mission aims to pave the way for future lunar exploration and potential Boston involvement.
Local universities may benefit from research opportunities stemming from Artemis II's scientific advancements.

articles.title: Mike Vrabel says Patriots will pick up Christian Gonzalez’s fifth-year option
articles.description:
The move will keep Gonzalez in New England through 2027.

The post Mike Vrabel says Patriots will pick up Christian Gonzalez’s fifth-year option appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Patriots will exercise Christian Gonzalez's fifth-year option, securing him through 2027.
Head Coach Mike Vrabel confirmed the decision on April 1, 2026.
This move strengthens the team's defense, benefiting Boston fans and the local sports community.

articles.title: Elias Lindholm, like the Bruins, is getting hot at the ideal time
